title: San Isidro, SJ — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

San Isidro is a city in SJ with a population of 80,000. A growing town in the Zona de los Santos coffee region, surrounded by cloud forests and coffee farms.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
